mapper.sql: select bt.id, bt.name as tag_name, bt.description, bt.color, bt.icon, bt.create_time, bt.update_time, bt.del_flag, COUNT(bat.article_id) as article_count from blog_tag bt left join blog_article_tag bat on bt.id = bat.tag_id left join blog_article ba on bat.article_id = ba.id and ba.status = 1 and ba.del_flag = 0
mapper.select:
and bt.name like concat('%', #{tagName}, '%') and bt.del_flag = 0
group by bt.id, bt.name, bt.description, bt.color, bt.icon, bt.create_time, bt.update_time, bt.del_flag
where bt.del_flag = 0 group by bt.id, bt.name, bt.description, bt.color, bt.icon, bt.create_time, bt.update_time, bt.del_flag
where bt.id = #{tagId} and bt.del_flag = 0 group by bt.id, bt.name, bt.description, bt.color, bt.icon, bt.create_time, bt.update_time, bt.del_flag
where bt.name = #{tagName} and bt.del_flag = 0 group by bt.id, bt.name, bt.description, bt.color, bt.icon, bt.create_time, bt.update_time, bt.del_flag limit 1
select count(1) from blog_article_tag where tag_id = #{tagId}

SELECT bt.id, bt.name, bt.color, COUNT(bat.article_id) as article_count FROM blog_tag bt LEFT JOIN blog_article_tag bat ON bt.id = bat.tag_id LEFT JOIN blog_article ba ON bat.article_id = ba.id AND ba.status = 1 AND ba.del_flag = 0 WHERE bt.del_flag = 0 GROUP BY bt.id, bt.name, bt.color ORDER BY article_count DESC, bt.create_time DESC

select bt.id, bt.name as tag_name, bt.description, bt.color, bt.icon, bt.create_time, bt.update_time, bt.del_flag from blog_tag bt inner join blog_article_tag bat on bt.id = bat.tag_id where bat.article_id = #{articleId} and bt.del_flag = 0
mapper.insert:
insert into blog_tag
name, description, color, icon, create_time, update_time, del_flag,
#{tagName}, #{description}, #{color}, #{icon}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{delFlag},
mapper.delete: update blog_tag set del_flag = 1 where id = #{tagId}

update blog_tag set del_flag = 1 where id in
#{tagId}
